---
title: "TRUEFAM Welfare — Campaign Contributions"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys, os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import date, datetime

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(os.path.abspath("")).resolve()))
sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(os.path.abspath("")).resolve().parent / "reports"))

from db_connection import query
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import display, HTML

now = datetime.now().strftime("%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p")
```

```{python}
#| label: styles
#| echo: false

display(HTML("""
<style>
  body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; background: #f8f8f6; }
  .confidential-banner {
    background: #fff; border: 2px solid #E24B4A; border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 14px 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: center;
  }
  .confidential-banner strong { color: #A32D2D; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  .confidential-banner p { color: #666; font-size: 12px; margin: 6px 0 0 0; }
  .report-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .report-header h2 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin: 0; }
  .report-header .timestamp { font-size: 12px; color: #888; margin-top: 4px; }
  .campaign-card {
    background: #fff; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 0; margin-bottom: 24px; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .campaign-header { background: #0f172a; color: #fff; padding: 18px 24px; }
  .campaign-header-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 14px 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .campaign-meta { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px 24px; }
  .meta-label { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  .meta-value { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin-top: 2px; color: #fff; }
  .status-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; }
  .status-open { background: #1D9E75; color: #fff; }
  .status-closed { background: #666; color: #fff; }
  .status-paused { background: #EF9F27; color: #fff; }
  .status-cancelled { background: #E24B4A; color: #fff; }
  .days-box { text-align: center; }
  .days-remaining { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; color: #fff; }
  .days-label { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-top: 2px; }
  .contrib-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px; }
  .contrib-table thead th {
    background: #f4f4f2; padding: 10px 16px; text-align: left;
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #666; text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }
  .contrib-table thead th:first-child { width: 40px; text-align: center; }
  .contrib-table thead th:last-child { text-align: right; }
  .contrib-table tbody td { padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
  .contrib-table tbody td:first-child { text-align: center; color: #aaa; }
  .contrib-table tbody td:last-child { text-align: right; font-weight: 500; }
  .contrib-table tbody tr.paid { background: #E1F5EE; }
  .contrib-table tbody tr.unpaid { background: #FCEBEB; }
  .contrib-table tbody tr.paid td.status-col { color: #0F6E56; font-weight: 600; }
  .contrib-table tbody tr.unpaid td.status-col { color: #A32D2D; font-weight: 600; }
  .status-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 6px; vertical-align: middle; }
  .status-dot.green { background: #1D9E75; }
  .status-dot.red { background: #E24B4A; }
  .campaign-footer { background: #f4f4f2; padding: 16px 24px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 12px; }
  .footer-label { font-size: 10px; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  .footer-value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; margin-top: 2px; }
  .footer-value.green { color: #0F6E56; }
  .footer-value.red { color: #A32D2D; }
  #quarto-header, .quarto-title-block { display: none; }
</style>
"""))
```

```{python}
#| label: banner-header
#| echo: false

display(HTML(f"""
<div class="confidential-banner">
  <strong>Confidential &mdash; Group Members Only</strong>
  <p>This report is intended solely for members of the indicated group. Sharing outside the group is strictly prohibited and may result in disciplinary action.</p>
</div>
<div class="report-header">
  <h2>Campaign Contributions Report</h2>
  <div class="timestamp">Generated {now}</div>
</div>
"""))
```

```{python}
#| label: campaigns
#| echo: false

def build_campaign_html(title, status, bereaved, group_name, deceased,
                        start_date, end_date, days_html, members_rows,
                        total_members, paid_count, unpaid_count,
                        total_collected, total_expected, collection_rate):
    status_class = f"status-{status}"
    status_label = status.capitalize()

    # Build table rows
    rows_html = ""
    if not members_rows:
        rows_html = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:#aaa;padding:24px;">No members in this campaign</td></tr>'
    else:
        for i, row in enumerate(members_rows, 1):
            is_paid = row["status"] == "paid"
            row_class = "paid" if is_paid else "unpaid"
            dot_class = "green" if is_paid else "red"
            status_text = "Paid" if is_paid else "Unpaid"
            amount = f"${row['amount'] / 100:,.2f}" if row["amount"] else "$0.00"
            name = row["name"].upper()
            rows_html += f'<tr class="{row_class}"><td>{i}</td><td>{row["member_id"]}</td><td>{name}</td><td class="status-col"><span class="status-dot {dot_class}"></span>{status_text}</td><td>{amount}</td></tr>\n'

    html = f"""
<div class="campaign-card">
  <div class="campaign-header">
    <div class="campaign-header-title">{title} &nbsp;<span class="status-pill {status_class}">{status_label}</span></div>
    <div class="campaign-meta">
      <div><div class="meta-label">Bereaved Member</div><div class="meta-value">{bereaved}</div></div>
      <div><div class="meta-label">Group</div><div class="meta-value">{group_name}</div></div>
      <div><div class="meta-label">Deceased Dependent</div><div class="meta-value">{deceased}</div></div>
      <div><div class="meta-label">Campaign Start</div><div class="meta-value">{start_date}</div></div>
      <div><div class="meta-label">Campaign End</div><div class="meta-value">{end_date}</div></div>
      <div class="days-box">{days_html}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <table class="contrib-table">
    <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Member ID</th><th>Member Name</th><th>Payment Status</th><th>Amount ($)</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>{rows_html}</tbody>
  </table>
  <div class="campaign-footer">
    <div><div class="footer-label">Total Members</div><div class="footer-value">{total_members}</div></div>
    <div><div class="footer-label">Paid</div><div class="footer-value green">{paid_count}</div></div>
    <div><div class="footer-label">Unpaid</div><div class="footer-value red">{unpaid_count}</div></div>
    <div><div class="footer-label">Total Collected</div><div class="footer-value green">${total_collected:,.2f}</div></div>
    <div><div class="footer-label">Total Expected</div><div class="footer-value">${total_expected:,.2f}</div></div>
    <div><div class="footer-label">Collection Rate</div><div class="footer-value">{collection_rate:.1f}%</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
"""
    return html


# ── Fetch campaigns from DB ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
campaigns_df = query("""
    SELECT
        cc.id AS campaign_id,
        cc.title AS campaign_title,
        cc.status AS campaign_status,
        cc.started_at,
        cc.due_date,
        mg.name AS group_name,
        u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name AS bereaved_member
    FROM claims_contributioncampaign cc
    JOIN members_membergroup mg ON cc.group_id = mg.id
    JOIN members_member m ON cc.claimant_member_id = m.id
    JOIN accounts_user u ON m.user_id = u.id
    ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN cc.status = 'open' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        cc.started_at DESC
""")

open_df = campaigns_df[campaigns_df["campaign_status"] == "open"]
closed_df = campaigns_df[campaigns_df["campaign_status"] != "open"].head(3)
campaigns_df = pd.concat([open_df, closed_df], ignore_index=True)

all_html = ""

if not campaigns_df.empty:
    for _, camp in campaigns_df.iterrows():
        cid = camp["campaign_id"]

        deceased_df = query(f"""
            SELECT ci.beneficiary_full_name
            FROM claims_claimitem ci
            JOIN claims_claim cl ON ci.claim_id = cl.id
            JOIN claims_contributioncampaign cc ON cc.claim_id = cl.id
            WHERE cc.id = {cid} AND ci.status = 'approved'
            LIMIT 1
        """)
        deceased_name = deceased_df["beneficiary_full_name"].iloc[0].upper() if not deceased_df.empty else "\u2014"

        obligations_df = query(f"""
            SELECT
                m.member_id,
                u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name AS member_name,
                co.status,
                co.amount_cents
            FROM claims_contributionobligation co
            JOIN members_member m ON co.member_id = m.id
            JOIN accounts_user u ON m.user_id = u.id
            WHERE co.campaign_id = {cid}
            ORDER BY m.member_id
        """)

        members_rows = [
            {"member_id": r["member_id"], "name": r["member_name"],
             "status": r["status"], "amount": r["amount_cents"]}
            for _, r in obligations_df.iterrows()
        ]

        status = camp["campaign_status"]
        start_str = pd.to_datetime(camp["started_at"]).strftime("%b %d, %Y") if camp["started_at"] else "\u2014"
        end_str = pd.to_datetime(camp["due_date"]).strftime("%b %d, %Y") if camp["due_date"] else "\u2014"

        if camp["due_date"] is not None and status == "open":
            due = pd.to_datetime(camp["due_date"]).date()
            remaining = max(0, (due - date.today()).days)
            days_html = f'<div class="days-remaining">{remaining}</div><div class="days-label">days remaining</div>'
        elif status != "open":
            days_html = f'<div class="days-remaining" style="font-size:14px;">{status.capitalize()}</div><div class="days-label">campaign {status}</div>'
        else:
            days_html = '<div class="days-remaining">\u2014</div><div class="days-label">no due date set</div>'

        total = len(members_rows)
        paid = sum(1 for r in members_rows if r["status"] == "paid")
        unpaid = total - paid
        collected = sum(r["amount"] for r in members_rows if r["status"] == "paid") / 100
        expected = sum(r["amount"] for r in members_rows) / 100
        rate = (paid / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0.0

        all_html += build_campaign_html(
            title=camp["campaign_title"] or f"Campaign #{cid}",
            status=status,
            bereaved=camp["bereaved_member"].upper(),
            group_name=camp["group_name"].upper(),
            deceased=deceased_name,
            start_date=start_str,
            end_date=end_str,
            days_html=days_html,
            members_rows=members_rows,
            total_members=total, paid_count=paid, unpaid_count=unpaid,
            total_collected=collected, total_expected=expected,
            collection_rate=rate,
        )

else:
    # No campaigns — show full structure with real group members
    groups_df = query("""
        SELECT mg.id AS group_id, mg.name AS group_name
        FROM members_membergroup mg
        WHERE mg.is_active = true
        ORDER BY mg.name
    """)

    if groups_df.empty:
        groups_data = [{"group_id": 0, "group_name": "TRUEFAM GROUP"}]
    else:
        groups_data = groups_df.to_dict("records")

    for grp in groups_data:
        if grp["group_id"] != 0:
            members_df = query(f"""
                SELECT
                    m.member_id,
                    u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name AS member_name
                FROM members_member m
                JOIN accounts_user u ON m.user_id = u.id
                JOIN enrollment_enrollmentapplication ea ON ea.member_id = m.id
                WHERE m.group_id = {grp['group_id']}
                  AND ea.status = 'approved'
                ORDER BY m.member_id
            """)
        else:
            members_df = pd.DataFrame()

        if not members_df.empty:
            members_rows = [
                {"member_id": r["member_id"], "name": r["member_name"],
                 "status": "pending", "amount": 0}
                for _, r in members_df.iterrows()
            ]
        else:
            members_rows = [
                {"member_id": "\u2014", "name": "\u2014", "status": "pending", "amount": 0}
            ]

        total = len(members_rows)
        days_html = '<div class="days-remaining">\u2014</div><div class="days-label">no active campaign</div>'

        all_html += build_campaign_html(
            title="No Active Campaign",
            status="closed",
            bereaved="\u2014",
            group_name=grp["group_name"].upper(),
            deceased="\u2014",
            start_date="\u2014",
            end_date="\u2014",
            days_html=days_html,
            members_rows=members_rows,
            total_members=total, paid_count=0, unpaid_count=total,
            total_collected=0.0, total_expected=0.0, collection_rate=0.0,
        )

display(HTML(all_html))
```
